case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 1080-1260s recommendationservice. Sustained mem spikes (dev=+1515 to +2290) confirm memory exhaustion as root cause. Trace latency (up to 7.7s) is propagation effect. Ranking updated to recommendationservice_mem.

Final RCA confirms recommendationservice memory exhaustion (dev=+1515 to +2290) as primary cause. Trace latency spikes are propagation effects. Top-3 ranking: recommendationservice_mem, checkoutservice_latency, currencyservice_latency.
